headline: Max marches on while Carolina and Grandad get the rough end
text: A tidy little round for Max, with Norway (Max) winning 2-1 and keeping the top spot comfy. Rosaria also had a belter as Mexico (Rosaria) beat Ecuador (Carolina) 2-0, and Carolina took another wobble with France (Carolina) losing 3-0 to Sweden (Emily). Grandad’s day went a bit pear-shaped too, thanks to Ivory Coast (Grandad) going down 2-1 to Norway (Max). Overall, Max is still best on 26 points, while Sofia is propping up the lot on 8. A proper scrap in the middle, that.
